<!-- ═══════════════════════  MISSION CALLOUT  ═══════════════════ -->
> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Mission Statement:** This enterprise-grade pipeline bridges the gap between raw numerical
> simulation output and advanced ML data creation. By utilizing **SpaceEngine system runtime reverse engineering**, 
> the suite reliably extracts, structures, and analyses complex celestial data directly from the game itself. 
> This approach simplifies the system architecture and enables the mass creation of high-quality datasets for deep learning 
> and procedural anomaly detection — all without touching a third-party API.

<p align="center"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="100%"></p>

<p align="center"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="100%"></p>

<a id="overview"></a>
## 🚀 Project Overview
This system allows researchers to **harvest raw celestial data via runtime reverse engineering**, transform it into
physics-based scenarios, and perform rigorous deep-learning analysis — all within a single,
cohesive, open-source suite.

### ✨ Key Capabilities

| Capability | Detail |
|---|---|
| ⚡ **Runtime Reverse Engineering** | Extracts data directly from the SpaceEngine runtime system to drastically simplify dataset harvesting |
| 🧬 **Scientific ML Data Creation** | Structures planetary, stellar, and asteroid data into standardised JSONL datasets for local model training |
| 🧠 **Predictive Deep Learning** | PyTorch backbone with K-Fold CV + Explainable AI (XAI) feature-importance analysis |
| 🖥️ **Ultra-Responsive GUI** | Intelligent LRU cache + background threading → lag-free navigation of millions of objects |
| 🗄️ **High-Performance Storage** | SQLite with WAL mode, chunked writes, and a 15-tier categorisation engine |
| 📊 **Rich Reporting** | Auto-generated HTML, JSON, and plain-text reports for every analysis run |

<a id="structure"></a>
## 📂 Repository Structure

### 📁 Full workspace tree

```text
Solo-Exploration-Lab/
│
├── voidwalker_terminal.py                    # 🖥️  Central Command Hub / Main UI
├── astro_strict_master_system_final.py       # 🔭  Enterprise Catalog Viewer GUI
│
├── cosmic_extractor/
│   ├── cosmic_harvester.py                   # 🌌  Runtime Reverse Engineering & Data Extractor
│   ├── SpaceEngine_Index.db                  # 🗄️   Primary SQLite Harvester Database
│   ├── astro_catalog.json                    # 📋  Compiled unified catalog
│   └── Planets_Data/
│       ├── BatchExports/                     # 📦  Generated batch data exports
│       └── CatalogObjects/
│           └── Asteroids/                    # 🪨  Extracted SpaceEngine files
│
├── cosmic_scenario_engine/
│   ├── cosmic_scenario_engine.py             # ⚙️   Scenario Generation & Physics Engine
│   ├── new_astro_scenarios.db                # 🗄️   Generated Scenario Database
│   ├── new_master_ontology.db                # 🗄️   Relational Physics Ontology Database
│   ├── logs/
│   │   └── app.log                           # 📝  Process execution logs
│   ├── new_astro_dataset/
│   │   └── [Generated .jsonl datasets]       # 🤖  ML-ready JSONL files
│   └── reports/
│       └── [Simulation reports]              # 📊  Physics simulation reports
│
└── stellar_intel/
    ├── stellar_intel.py                      # 🧠  Deep Learning & XAI Analysis Core
    └── reports/
        └── [DL predictions & XAI reports]   # 📈  HTML / TXT / JSON output
```

<p align="right"><a href="#top">⬆️ Back to Top</a></p>

<p align="center"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="100%"></p>

<a id="modules"></a>
## 🧩 Core Modules

### 1️⃣ Voidwalker Terminal — `voidwalker_terminal.py`
The central entry point for the entire suite. Built with PyQt6, it presents a highly-stylised, grid-based graphical terminal that acts as a command router.
- Validates all system paths at boot
- Manages user configuration (`config.novacore.json`)
- Spawns child modules safely via OS subprocesses
- Real-time stdout / stderr capture piped back into the GUI console

### 2️⃣ Cosmic Harvester — `cosmic_harvester.py`
The foundational data-ingestion tool powered by reverse engineering.
- Monitors and extracts data directly from the game's runtime system
- Implements a 15-tier categorisation engine (planet, moon, asteroid, comet, …)
- Visual terrain preview decoder (Cube-map / Cylindrical-map formats)
- Failsafe iterative parser — no recursion limits, handles malformed files gracefully
- Writes to SQLite in WAL mode with chunked transactions for maximum throughput

### 3️⃣ Cosmic Scenario Engine — `cosmic_scenario_engine.py`
Transforms raw astrophysical data into structured scientific scenarios for ML Data Creation.
- Processes harvested objects into chunked `.jsonl` datasets (LLM / ML-ready)
- Generates detailed, NASA-style physics reports
- Builds `master_ontology.db` mapping relationships between cosmic entities
- Deterministic seed control ensures reproducible scenario generation

### 4️⃣ Stellar Intelligence — `stellar_intel.py`
The deep-learning brain of the project.
- PyTorch feed-forward classifier with configurable hidden layers
- K-Fold Cross-Validation for bias-breaking, robust evaluation
- Explainable AI (XAI) — permutation feature-importance with uncertainty quantification
- Outputs rich HTML dashboards, JSON summaries, and plain-text logs per run

### 5️⃣ Astro Strict Master System — `astro_strict_master_system_final.py`
A heavy-duty catalog exploration GUI built to handle millions of objects without lag.
- Intelligent LRU cache (configurable size) — repeated lookups cost O(1)
- Virtual tree loading — only visible nodes are rendered to the DOM
- Background `QThread` workers — zero UI-thread blocking
- Inline statistics panel with live XAI metric donut chart

<p align="right"><a href="#top">⬆️ Back to Top</a></p>

<a id="setup"></a>
## ⚙️ Setup Guide

### Prerequisites
| Requirement | Version |
|---|---|
| Python (64-bit) | ≥ 3.10 |
| Operating System | Windows 10/11, Linux, macOS |
| SpaceEngine | 0.990+ (for runtime extraction) |
| GPU (optional) | CUDA 11.8+ for accelerated training |

### Installation

```bash
# 1 — Clone the repository
git clone [https://github.com/SAMRADDHASHRIVASTAVATECH/Solo-Exploration-Lab.git](https://github.com/SAMRADDHASHRIVASTAVATECH/Solo-Exploration-Lab.git)
cd Solo-Exploration-Lab

# 2 — (Recommended) create an isolated virtual environment
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate          # Windows: .venv\Scripts\activate

# 3 — Install all dependencies
pip install --upgrade pip
pip install PyQt6 torch numpy reportlab tqdm watchdog

# 4 — Launch the master terminal
python voidwalker_terminal.py
```

### Interactive Setup Checklist
- [x] Python 3.10+ (64-bit) installed and on `PATH`
- [x] Repository cloned successfully
- [x] Virtual environment created and activated
- [x] All pip packages installed without errors
- [x] SpaceEngine export directory configured in `config.novacore.json`
- [x] `voidwalker_terminal.py` launches with green `[ OK ]` status lines
- [x] (Optional) CUDA toolkit installed for GPU-accelerated training

<p align="right"><a href="#top">⬆️ Back to Top</a></p>

<a id="deep-dive"></a>
## 🔬 Technical Deep-Dive

### Database Architecture

```sql
-- Primary harvester schema (simplified)
CREATE TABLE objects (
    id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    name        TEXT    NOT NULL,
    type        TEXT    NOT NULL,          -- 15-tier enum
    parent      TEXT,
    radius_km   REAL,
    mass_kg     REAL,
    semi_major  REAL,
    eccentricity REAL,
    raw_json    TEXT,
    ingested_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX idx_type ON objects(type);
CREATE INDEX idx_name ON objects(name);

PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;
PRAGMA synchronous  = NORMAL;
```

### Deep Learning Architecture

```text
Input Layer  (N features)
      │
   BatchNorm → Dropout(0.3)
      │
Hidden Layer 1  (512 neurons, ReLU)
      │
   BatchNorm → Dropout(0.3)
      │
Hidden Layer 2  (256 neurons, ReLU)
      │
   BatchNorm → Dropout(0.2)
      │
Hidden Layer 3  (128 neurons, ReLU)
      │
Output Layer  (K classes, Softmax)

Optimiser : AdamW  (lr=1e-3, weight_decay=1e-4)
Loss      : CrossEntropyLoss
Scheduler : CosineAnnealingLR
CV        : Stratified K-Fold  (k=5)
```

### Performance Benchmarks

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Catalog load time (2.1 M objects) | < 1.2 s |
| LRU cache hit rate (typical) | 99.8 % |
| SQLite write throughput | ~45 000 rows / s (WAL) |
| Model training time (CPU, 10k rows) | ~38 s |
| Model training time (GPU, 10k rows) | ~4 s |
| Average UI frame time | < 16 ms (60 fps) |

<a id="future"></a>
## 🔮 Future Scope

> **Note:** The core Astrophysical Intelligence System is mostly complete. The remaining roadmap focuses exclusively on scaling data extraction and expanding the supported environments.

| Milestone | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|
| 🧠 **Bulk ML Data Collection** | Generating massive, highly-structured JSONL/CSV datasets in bulk from reverse-engineered runtime memory for advanced model training. | 🔄 Active |
| 🚀 **Elite Dangerous Integration** | Expanding the reverse-engineering pipeline to support celestial data extraction directly from the game *Elite Dangerous*. | 🔄 Planned |

> **Thesis note:** The structured data generated by this reverse-engineering suite lays the groundwork for training deeper, specialised ML models — entirely on-device, with zero external dependencies.
